records.m_Talk_ENG: How do you feel right now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: How do you feel right now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: How do you feel right now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Strength is suddenly surging through my body.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Strength is suddenly surging through my body.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Strength is suddenly surging through my body.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This feeling... what do you call it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: This feeling... what do you call it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: This feeling... what do you call it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You've awakened as a Counter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You've awakened as a Counter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You've awakened as a Counter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not only that, you've also been chosen as the new Antagonist in place of the original one.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not only that, you've also been chosen as the new Antagonist in place of the original one.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not only that, you've also been chosen as the new Antagonist in place of the original one.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Just like the girl in your memories.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Just like the girl in your memories.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Just like the girl in your memories.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Mordred?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Mordred?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Mordred?

records.m_Talk_ENG: But she...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But she...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But she...

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yes. She failed and died.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yes. She failed and died.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yes. She failed and died.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whether you meet the same fate this time or defeat the Demon Lord and survive depends on what you do.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whether you meet the same fate this time or defeat the Demon Lord and survive depends on what you do.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whether you meet the same fate this time or defeat the Demon Lord and survive depends on what you do.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I defeat Thagirion... what happens then?
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I defeat Thagirion... what happens then?
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I defeat Thagirion... what happens then?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You'll become the new Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You'll become the new Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You'll become the new Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's what an Antagonist in a world without the Wolf becomes.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's what an Antagonist in a world without the Wolf becomes.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's what an Antagonist in a world without the Wolf becomes.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I... don't want to become a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I... don't want to become a Demon Lord.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I... don't want to become a Demon Lord.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't want to lose everything to Thagirion either.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't want to lose everything to Thagirion either.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't want to lose everything to Thagirion either.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then you have no choice but to choose the lesser evil instead of the worst.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then you have no choice but to choose the lesser evil instead of the worst.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then you have no choice but to choose the lesser evil instead of the worst.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you going to give up here and let Thagirion run rampant?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you going to give up here and let Thagirion run rampant?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you going to give up here and let Thagirion run rampant?

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's something I absolutely have to do after I defeat her.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's something I absolutely have to do after I defeat her.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's something I absolutely have to do after I defeat her.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You said there's someone precious you want to take back, right?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You said there's someone precious you want to take back, right?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You said there's someone precious you want to take back, right?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I don't know how much help I'll be... but I'll help too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I don't know how much help I'll be... but I'll help too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I don't know how much help I'll be... but I'll help too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Yoo Mina.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Yoo Mina.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Yoo Mina.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have you thought of a way to finish her off?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have you thought of a way to finish her off?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have you thought of a way to finish her off?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Seven magic bullets... that no being can escape.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Seven magic bullets... that no being can escape.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Seven magic bullets... that no being can escape.

records.m_Talk_ENG: With this, I'll end it for sure.
records.m_Talk_DEU: With this, I'll end it for sure.
records.m_Talk_FRA: With this, I'll end it for sure.
